endpoints.name: GET /v1beta2/{name}:calculate
endpoints.description: Calculates the effective WebSecurityScannerSettings based on its level in the resource hierarchy and its settings. Settings provided closer to the target resource take precedence over those further away (e.g. folder will override organization level settings). The default SCC setting for the detector service defaults can be overridden at organization, folder and project levels. No assumptions should be made about the SCC defaults as it is considered an internal implementation detail.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
